name: agent-engineering-toolkit
description: Multi-plugin marketplace for evidence-based Claude Code artifact engineering. Provides plugins for configuration initialization (AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md) and artifact creation/optimization (skills, hooks, rules, subagents).

plugins.name: agents-initializer
plugins.description: Generate and optimize minimal, scoped AGENTS.md and CLAUDE.md configuration files based on academic research and Anthropic best practices. Uses subagent-driven analysis for context-efficient file generation.

plugins.name: agent-customizer
plugins.description: Create and improve Claude Code artifacts (skills, hooks, rules, subagents) with documentation-grounded guidance and evidence traceability.
